parameters.query:
SELECT
  to_char(((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires')::date - 1),'DD/MM/YYYY') AS dia,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM contenido.revisiones WHERE estado='pendiente_aprobacion') AS pendientes,
  COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('titulo',titulo,'hora',hora,'formato',formato,'permalink',permalink) ORDER BY pub) FILTER (WHERE titulo IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json) AS publicados
FROM (
  SELECT pz.titulo_interno AS titulo, r.publicado_en AS pub,
         to_char(r.publicado_en AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires','HH24:MI') AS hora,
         r.formato, r.ig_permalink AS permalink
  FROM contenido.piezas pz JOIN contenido.revisiones r ON r.id=pz.revision_vigente
  WHERE r.estado='publicada'
    AND (r.publicado_en AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires')::date
        = ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires')::date - 1)
) s;
